name: Scattering from the Tower
oracleText:
Return up to two target creatures to their owners' hands.
Exile up to one target artifact. Its controller creates a Treasure token.
flavorText: "So the Lord scattered them abroad from thence upon the face of all the earth." — Genesis 11:8
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the existing Early World Babel-era tower artwork for the scattering scene.
